QueryReadFromRecPurchsOrder.value: '--Version 1.0 SELECT  	 [ProductId]=POD.di_inventory 	,[WarehouseId]=R.di_warehouse_id 	,[WarehouseLocationId]=RD.[di_warehouse_location_id] 	,[SupplierCode]=PO.ds_supplier 	,[RemittoSupplierCode]=PO.ds_supplier_remitto 	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST((CAST(R.di_receiving_id as varchar(10))+':'+PO.ds_project) as varchar(30)) 	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST((CAST(Rd.di_receiving_dtl_id as varchar(10))+'-'+CAST( POD.[di_purchase_order_dtl_id] as varchar(10))) as varchar(40)) 	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER  				(Partition by POD.[di_inventory],R.[di_warehouse_id] 							,R.di_receiving_id  							ORDER BY di_receiving_dtl_id,POD.[di_purchase_order_dtl_id]) 	,[TransactionStatus]=PO.[di_status] 	,[TransactionType]= CAST( 'Receiving-Purchase Order' as VARCHAR(30)) 	,[CreatedDate]=PO.dd_created 	,[ReleasedDate]=PO.dd_released 	,[CompletedDate]=PO.dd_completed 	,[DeleteDate]=PO.dd_deleted 	,[JournalDate]=R.dd_journal 	,[RequiredDate]=PO.dd_required 	,[FilledDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime) 	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=POD.dd_confirmed_delivery 	,[Quantity]=RD.di_qty_received 	,[UnitCost]=CAST((POD.dn_price) as numeric(14,2)) 	,[IsReceivedForStock]=db_stock FROM dbo.pur_receiving_dtl RD WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN dbo.pur_receiving R WITH (NOLOCK) ON R.di_receiving_id=RD.di_receiving_id INNER JOIN dbo.[pur_purchase_order_dtl] POD WITH (NOLOCK) ON RD.di_purchase_order_dtl_id=POD.di_purchase_order_dtl_id INNER JOIN dbo.[pur_purchase_order] PO WITH (NOLOCK) ON PO.di_purchase_order_id = POD.di_purchase_order_id AND R.di_purchase_order_id=PO.di_purchase_order_id  --WHERE   [di_inventory] IN (999817) '

QueryReadFromStockReqstion.value: '--Version 1.0 SELECT 	 [ProductId]=SRD.[di_inventory] 	,[WarehouseId]=SR.[di_warehouse_id] 	,[WarehouseLocationId]=SRD.[di_warehouse_location_id] 	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST([SRD].di_stock_requisition_id as VARCHAR(30)) 	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST(CAST(SRD.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id as varchar(20)) + '-' + CAST([di_stock_requisition_dtl_stock_id] as VARCHAR(20)) as VARCHAR(40)) 	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER  					(Partition by SRD.[di_inventory],SR.[di_warehouse_id] 								,SRD.di_stock_requisition_id 								ORDER BY SRD.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id,[di_stock_requisition_dtl_stock_id]) 	,[TransactionStatus]=SR.[di_status] 	,[TransactionType]=CAST('Stock Requisition' as VARCHAR(30)) 	,[CreatedDate]=SR.[dd_created] 	,[ReleasedDate]=SR.dd_released 	,[CompletedDate]=SR.dd_completed 	,[DeleteDate]=SR.dd_deleted 	,[JournalDate]=SR.dd_journal 	,[RequiredDate]=SR.dd_required 	,[FilledDate]=SR.dd_filled 	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[Quantity]=0-[di_qty] 	,[UnitCost]=CAST([dn_cost] as NUMERIC(14, 2))   FROM   	(SELECT	 [di_stock_requisition_dtl_stock_id] ,1as id  		,[di_stock_requisition_dtl_id] 		,[di_qty] 		,[dn_cost] 	FROM [dbo].[ord_stock_requisition_dtl_stock]  WITH (NOLOCK) 	UNION ALL 	SELECT 	 [di_stock_requisition_dtl_opening_id], 2 as id 		,[di_stock_requisition_dtl_id] 		,([di_qty]-di_qty_deleted) as [di_qty] 		,[dn_cost_wip] as [dn_cost] 	FROM [dbo].[ord_stock_requisition_dtl_opening] WITH (NOLOCK) 	WHERE   di_stock_requisition_dtl_id NOT IN 		(SELECT di_stock_requisition_dtl_id 		  FROM [dbo].[ord_stock_requisition_dtl_stock]  WITH (NOLOCK)) ) SRDO INNER JOIN dbo.ord_stock_requisition_dtl SRD WITH (NOLOCK) ON SRDO.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id=SRD.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id INNER JOIN dbo.ord_stock_requisition SR WITH (NOLOCK) ON SRD.di_stock_requisition_id = SR.di_stock_requisition_id  '

QueryReadfromSourceAG.value: '--Ver1.0 Initial  --Ver1.0 Initial WITH MXDt as ( SELECT MAX(FILEDATE) MXFiledate FROM [Stg].[AgilityInvtyStockFile]) SELECT 	[ProductId] = CAST([ProductCode] AS int) 	,[Description] = CAST([MetricDescription] AS varchar(1024)) 	,[ProductTypeCategoryCode] = CAST([ProductTypeCategoryCode] AS varchar(30))  	,[ManufacturerCode] = CAST([ManufacturerCode] AS varchar(50))  	,[WarehouseId] = CAST([WarehouseId] AS int) 	,[WarehouseLocationId] = CAST([WarehouseId] AS int)  	,[DivisionCode] = CAST([DivisionCode] AS varchar(8))  	,[SupplierCode] = CAST('N/A' AS varchar(10)) 	,[TransactionHeaderID] = CAST('Agility Invty' AS varchar(30)) 	,[TransactionDetailID] = CAST('N/A' AS varchar(40)) 	,[TransactionStatus] = CAST(-1 AS int) 	,[TransactionType] = CAST( 'Receiving-Purchase Order AG' AS varchar(30)) 	,[CreatedDate] = CAST([LAST RECEIVE DATE] AS datetime) 	,[ReleasedDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[CompletedDate] = CAST([LAST RECEIVE DATE] AS datetime) 	,[DeleteDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime) 		,[JournalDate] = CAST(ISNULL([LAST RECEIVE DATE],FileDate) AS datetime) ,[RequiredDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[FilledDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[IsReceivedForStock] = CAST(1 AS bit) 	,[IsWarehouseStockItem] = CAST(1 AS bit) 	,[IsFifo] = CAST(0 AS bit) 	,[Quantity] = CAST(ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY ON HAND] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0) AS int) 	,[QuantityUsed] = CAST(ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY COMMITTED] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0) AS int) 	,[QuantityRemaining] = CAST((ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY ON HAND] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0)- 								 ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY COMMITTED] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0))  AS int) 	,[UnitCost] = CAST(ISNULL([Last Received Unit Cost],'0') AS numeric(14,2)) 	,[ExtendedCost] = CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QOH],'0') AS numeric(14,2)) 	,[ExtendedCostUsed] = CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QTY COMMITTED],'0') AS numeric(14,2)) 	,[ExtendedCostRemaining] = CAST( CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QOH],'0') AS decimal(14,2))  										- CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QTY COMMITTED],'0') AS decimal(14,2)) AS numeric(14,2))     FROM [Stg].[AgilityInvtyStockFile] F LEFT JOIN DBO.Product P ON P.[Description] = F.Item+'|'+F.[Description] 							AND P.SourceSystemId = 6 LEFT JOIN DBO.Warehouse W ON W.Code = ISNULL(F.[Location],'') 							AND W.SourceSystemId = 6  WHERE FileDate IN (SELECT MXFiledate FROM MXDT)   '

QueryReadFromPoolStockInv.value: '--Ver 1.0 SELECT   	 [ProductId]=PSI.[di_inventory] 	,[WarehouseId]=PWL.[di_warehouse_id] 	,[WarehouseLocationId]=PWL.[di_warehouse_location_id] 	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST(PS.di_pool_stock_id  as VARCHAR(30)) 	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST(PSI.di_pool_stock_inventory_id as VARCHAR(40)) 	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER  					(Partition by PSI.[di_inventory],PWL.[di_warehouse_id] 								,PS.di_pool_stock_id 								ORDER BY di_pool_stock_inventory_id) 	,[TransactionStatus]=3 	,[TransactionType]=CAST('Pool Stock' as VARCHAR(30)) 	,[CreatedDate]=PS.[dd_created] 	,[ReleasedDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[CompletedDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[DeleteDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[JournalDate]=PS.dd_journal 	,[RequiredDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[FilledDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime) 	,[Quantity]=[di_qty] 	,[UnitCost]=CAST([dn_cost] as NUMERIC(14, 2)) FROM [dbo].[pool_stock_inventory] PSI WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.prd_warehouse_location PWL WITH (NOLOCK) ON PWL.di_warehouse_location_id=PSI.di_warehouse_location_id JOIN [dbo].[pool_stock] PS WITH (NOLOCK) ON PSI.di_pool_stock_id=PS.di_pool_stock_id --WHERE di_inventory IN(999817) '

QueryReadFromProductCount.value: '--Version 1.0  SELECT  	 [ProductId]=[di_product_id] 	,[WarehouseId]=PC.[di_warehouse_id] 	,[WarehouseLocationId]=PCSD.[di_warehouse_location_id] 	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST([PCSD].[di_product_count_id] as varchar(30)) 	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST((CAST([di_product_count_dtl_id] as varchar(10))+'-'+Src) as  varchar(40)) 	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER  					(Partition by [di_product_id],PC.[di_warehouse_id],[PCSD].[di_product_count_id] 								ORDER BY [di_product_count_dtl_id]) 	,[TransactionStatus]=[di_status] 	,[TransactionType]=CAST('Product Count' as varchar(30)) 	,[CreatedDate]=[dd_created] 	,[ReleasedDate]=[dd_released] 	,[CompletedDate]=[dd_completed] 	,[DeleteDate]=[dd_deleted] 	,[JournalDate]=[dd_journal] 	,[RequiredDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime) 	,[FilledDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime) 	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime) 	,[Quantity]=di_qty 	,[UnitCost]=CAST(PCSD.dn_cost as Numeric(14,2)) FROM ( 	SELECT 		 'PCS' as Src  		,di_product_count_id 		,di_product_count_stock_id as di_product_count_dtl_id 		,di_product_dtl_id   		,0-di_qty as di_qty 		,PCS.dn_cost 		,-5 di_warehouse_location_id   	FROM dbo.prd_product_count_stock PCS WITH (NOLOCK) 	 	UNION ALL 	 	SELECT  		'PCD' as Src  		,di_product_count_id 		,di_product_count_dtl_id  		,di_product_dtl_id  		,di_qty_counted  -  di_qty_released as di_qty  		,PCD.dn_cost   		,di_warehouse_location_id 	FROM dbo.prd_product_count_dtl PCD WITH (NOLOCK) 	INNER JOIN dbo.prd_product_dtl_warehouse_location PDWL  WITH (NOLOCK) 				 ON PDWL.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id = PCD.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id 	WHERE di_qty_counted  -  di_qty_released >0 	) PCSD INNER JOIN dbo.prd_product_count PC  WITH (NOLOCK) ON PC.di_product_count_id = PCSD.di_product_count_id INNER JOIN dbo.prd_product_dtl PD  WITH (NOLOCK) ON PD.di_product_dtl_id = PCSD.di_product_dtl_id  WHERE [di_status] <4 AND di_qty <> 0  --AND   [di_product_id] IN (999817) '

QueryReadFromWorkOrder.value: '-- Version 1.0 SELECT [ProductId] = [di_product_id] 	,[WarehouseId] = WO.[di_warehouse_id] 	,[WarehouseLocationId]=PDWL.[di_warehouse_location_id] 	,[TransactionHeaderID] = CAST(WO.di_work_order_id AS VARCHAR(30)) 	,[TransactionDetailID] = CAST(di_work_order_stock_id AS VARCHAR(40)) 	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER  					(Partition by [di_product_id],WO.[di_warehouse_id] 								,WO.di_work_order_id 								ORDER BY di_work_order_stock_id) 	,[TransactionStatus] = [di_status] 	,[TransactionType] = CAST('Work Order' AS VARCHAR(30)) 	,[CreatedDate] = [dd_created] 	,[ReleasedDate] = [dd_released] 	,[CompletedDate] = [dd_completed] 	,[DeleteDate] = [dd_deleted] 	,[JournalDate] = [dd_journal] 	,[RequiredDate] = CAST(NULL AS DATETIME) 	,[FilledDate] = CAST(NULL AS DATETIME) 	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate] = CAST(NULL AS DATETIME) 	,[Quantity] = WOS.di_qty 	,[UnitCost] = CAST(WOS.dn_cost AS NUMERIC(14, 2)) FROM [dbo].[ord_work_order] WO   JOIN [dbo].[ord_work_order_stock] WOS ON WOS.di_work_order_id = WO.di_work_order_id   JOIN [dbo].[prd_product_dtl_warehouse_location] PDWL ON PDWL.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id = WOS.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id   JOIN prd_product_dtl PD ON PD.di_product_dtl_id = PDWL.di_product_dtl_id AND PD.di_warehouse_id = WO.[di_warehouse_id]  --WHERE   [di_product_Id] IN (999817) '

scripts.text:
SELECT ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ETLCreateDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS RowsInserted
FROM [dbo].[FactInventoryTransaction] WHERE 
  $partition.[parfn_SourceSytemId_New](SOURCESYSTEMID) = 2
AND ETLExecutionID=340

QueryReadFromRecPurchsOrder.defaultValue:
'--Version 1.0
SELECT 
	 [ProductId]=POD.di_inventory
	,[WarehouseId]=R.di_warehouse_id
	,[WarehouseLocationId]=RD.[di_warehouse_location_id]
	,[SupplierCode]=PO.ds_supplier
	,[RemittoSupplierCode]=PO.ds_supplier_remitto
	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST((CAST(R.di_receiving_id as varchar(10))+':'+PO.ds_project) as varchar(30))
	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST((CAST(Rd.di_receiving_dtl_id as varchar(10))+'-'+CAST( POD.[di_purchase_order_dtl_id] as varchar(10))) as varchar(40))
	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER 
				(Partition by POD.[di_inventory],R.[di_warehouse_id]
							,R.di_receiving_id 
							ORDER BY di_receiving_dtl_id,POD.[di_purchase_order_dtl_id])
	,[TransactionStatus]=PO.[di_status]
	,[TransactionType]= CAST( 'Receiving-Purchase Order' as VARCHAR(30))
	,[CreatedDate]=PO.dd_created
	,[ReleasedDate]=PO.dd_released
	,[CompletedDate]=PO.dd_completed
	,[DeleteDate]=PO.dd_deleted
	,[JournalDate]=R.dd_journal
	,[RequiredDate]=PO.dd_required
	,[FilledDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime)
	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=POD.dd_confirmed_delivery
	,[Quantity]=RD.di_qty_received
	,[UnitCost]=CAST((POD.dn_price) as numeric(14,2))
	,[IsReceivedForStock]=db_stock
FROM dbo.pur_receiving_dtl RD WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN dbo.pur_receiving R WITH (NOLOCK) ON R.di_receiving_id=RD.di_receiving_id
INNER JOIN dbo.[pur_purchase_order_dtl] POD WITH (NOLOCK) ON RD.di_purchase_order_dtl_id=POD.di_purchase_order_dtl_id
INNER JOIN dbo.[pur_purchase_order] PO WITH (NOLOCK) ON PO.di_purchase_order_id = POD.di_purchase_order_id AND R.di_purchase_order_id=PO.di_purchase_order_id

--WHERE   [di_inventory] IN (999817)'

QueryReadFromStockReqstion.defaultValue:
'--Version 1.0
SELECT
	 [ProductId]=SRD.[di_inventory]
	,[WarehouseId]=SR.[di_warehouse_id]
	,[WarehouseLocationId]=SRD.[di_warehouse_location_id]
	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST([SRD].di_stock_requisition_id as VARCHAR(30))
	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST(CAST(SRD.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id as varchar(20)) + '-' + CAST([di_stock_requisition_dtl_stock_id] as VARCHAR(20)) as VARCHAR(40))
	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER 
					(Partition by SRD.[di_inventory],SR.[di_warehouse_id]
								,SRD.di_stock_requisition_id
								ORDER BY SRD.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id,[di_stock_requisition_dtl_stock_id])
	,[TransactionStatus]=SR.[di_status]
	,[TransactionType]=CAST('Stock Requisition' as VARCHAR(30))
	,[CreatedDate]=SR.[dd_created]
	,[ReleasedDate]=SR.dd_released
	,[CompletedDate]=SR.dd_completed
	,[DeleteDate]=SR.dd_deleted
	,[JournalDate]=SR.dd_journal
	,[RequiredDate]=SR.dd_required
	,[FilledDate]=SR.dd_filled
	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[Quantity]=0-[di_qty]
	,[UnitCost]=CAST([dn_cost] as NUMERIC(14, 2)) 
 FROM  
	(SELECT	 [di_stock_requisition_dtl_stock_id] ,1as id 
		,[di_stock_requisition_dtl_id]
		,[di_qty]
		,[dn_cost]
	FROM [dbo].[ord_stock_requisition_dtl_stock]  WITH (NOLOCK)
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 	 [di_stock_requisition_dtl_opening_id], 2 as id
		,[di_stock_requisition_dtl_id]
		,([di_qty]-di_qty_deleted) as [di_qty]
		,[dn_cost_wip] as [dn_cost]
	FROM [dbo].[ord_stock_requisition_dtl_opening] WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE   di_stock_requisition_dtl_id NOT IN
		(SELECT di_stock_requisition_dtl_id
		  FROM [dbo].[ord_stock_requisition_dtl_stock]  WITH (NOLOCK))
) SRDO
INNER JOIN dbo.ord_stock_requisition_dtl SRD WITH (NOLOCK) ON SRDO.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id=SRD.di_stock_requisition_dtl_id
INNER JOIN dbo.ord_stock_requisition SR WITH (NOLOCK) ON SRD.di_stock_requisition_id = SR.di_stock_requisition_id'

QueryReadfromSourceAG.defaultValue:
'--Ver1.0 Initial

--Ver1.0 Initial
WITH MXDt as (
SELECT MAX(FILEDATE) MXFiledate FROM [Stg].[AgilityInvtyStockFile]) SELECT
	[ProductId] = CAST([ProductCode] AS int)
	,[Description] = CAST([MetricDescription] AS varchar(1024))
	,[ProductTypeCategoryCode] = CAST([ProductTypeCategoryCode] AS varchar(30))
 	,[ManufacturerCode] = CAST([ManufacturerCode] AS varchar(50))
 	,[WarehouseId] = CAST([WarehouseId] AS int)
	,[WarehouseLocationId] = CAST([WarehouseId] AS int)
 	,[DivisionCode] = CAST([DivisionCode] AS varchar(8))
 	,[SupplierCode] = CAST('N/A' AS varchar(10))
	,[TransactionHeaderID] = CAST('Agility Invty' AS varchar(30))
	,[TransactionDetailID] = CAST('N/A' AS varchar(40))
	,[TransactionStatus] = CAST(-1 AS int)
	,[TransactionType] = CAST( 'Receiving-Purchase Order AG' AS varchar(30))
	,[CreatedDate] = CAST([LAST RECEIVE DATE] AS datetime)
	,[ReleasedDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[CompletedDate] = CAST([LAST RECEIVE DATE] AS datetime)
	,[DeleteDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime)
		,[JournalDate] = CAST(ISNULL([LAST RECEIVE DATE],FileDate) AS datetime)
,[RequiredDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[FilledDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate] = CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[IsReceivedForStock] = CAST(1 AS bit)
	,[IsWarehouseStockItem] = CAST(1 AS bit)
	,[IsFifo] = CAST(0 AS bit)
	,[Quantity] = CAST(ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY ON HAND] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0) AS int)
	,[QuantityUsed] = CAST(ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY COMMITTED] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0) AS int)
	,[QuantityRemaining] = CAST((ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY ON HAND] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0)-
								 ISNULL(ROUND(CAST([QTY COMMITTED] AS NUMERIC(10,2)),0),0))  AS int)
	,[UnitCost] = CAST(ISNULL([Last Received Unit Cost],'0') AS numeric(14,2))
	,[ExtendedCost] = CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QOH],'0') AS numeric(14,2))
	,[ExtendedCostUsed] = CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QTY COMMITTED],'0') AS numeric(14,2))
	,[ExtendedCostRemaining] = CAST( CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QOH],'0') AS decimal(14,2)) 
										- CAST(ISNULL([EXTENDED COST QTY COMMITTED],'0') AS decimal(14,2)) AS numeric(14,2))
  
 FROM [Stg].[AgilityInvtyStockFile] F
LEFT JOIN DBO.Product P ON P.[Description] = F.Item+'|'+F.[Description]
							AND P.SourceSystemId = 6
LEFT JOIN DBO.Warehouse W ON W.Code = ISNULL(F.[Location],'')
							AND W.SourceSystemId = 6
 WHERE FileDate IN (SELECT MXFiledate FROM MXDT)'

QueryReadFromPoolStockInv.defaultValue:
'--Ver 1.0
SELECT  
	 [ProductId]=PSI.[di_inventory]
	,[WarehouseId]=PWL.[di_warehouse_id]
	,[WarehouseLocationId]=PWL.[di_warehouse_location_id]
	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST(PS.di_pool_stock_id  as VARCHAR(30))
	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST(PSI.di_pool_stock_inventory_id as VARCHAR(40))
	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER 
					(Partition by PSI.[di_inventory],PWL.[di_warehouse_id]
								,PS.di_pool_stock_id
								ORDER BY di_pool_stock_inventory_id)
	,[TransactionStatus]=3
	,[TransactionType]=CAST('Pool Stock' as VARCHAR(30))
	,[CreatedDate]=PS.[dd_created]
	,[ReleasedDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[CompletedDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[DeleteDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[JournalDate]=PS.dd_journal
	,[RequiredDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[FilledDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=CAST(NULL AS datetime)
	,[Quantity]=[di_qty]
	,[UnitCost]=CAST([dn_cost] as NUMERIC(14, 2))
FROM [dbo].[pool_stock_inventory] PSI WITH (NOLOCK)
JOIN dbo.prd_warehouse_location PWL WITH (NOLOCK) ON PWL.di_warehouse_location_id=PSI.di_warehouse_location_id
JOIN [dbo].[pool_stock] PS WITH (NOLOCK) ON PSI.di_pool_stock_id=PS.di_pool_stock_id
--WHERE di_inventory IN(999817)'

QueryReadFromProductCount.defaultValue:
'--Version 1.0 
SELECT 
	 [ProductId]=[di_product_id]
	,[WarehouseId]=PC.[di_warehouse_id]
	,[WarehouseLocationId]=PCSD.[di_warehouse_location_id]
	,[TransactionHeaderID]=CAST([PCSD].[di_product_count_id] as varchar(30))
	,[TransactionDetailID]=CAST((CAST([di_product_count_dtl_id] as varchar(10))+'-'+Src) as  varchar(40))
	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER 
					(Partition by [di_product_id],PC.[di_warehouse_id],[PCSD].[di_product_count_id]
								ORDER BY [di_product_count_dtl_id])
	,[TransactionStatus]=[di_status]
	,[TransactionType]=CAST('Product Count' as varchar(30))
	,[CreatedDate]=[dd_created]
	,[ReleasedDate]=[dd_released]
	,[CompletedDate]=[dd_completed]
	,[DeleteDate]=[dd_deleted]
	,[JournalDate]=[dd_journal]
	,[RequiredDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime)
	,[FilledDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime)
	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate]=CAST(NULL as datetime)
	,[Quantity]=di_qty
	,[UnitCost]=CAST(PCSD.dn_cost as Numeric(14,2))
FROM (
	SELECT
		 'PCS' as Src 
		,di_product_count_id
		,di_product_count_stock_id as di_product_count_dtl_id
		,di_product_dtl_id  
		,0-di_qty as di_qty
		,PCS.dn_cost
		,-5 di_warehouse_location_id  
	FROM dbo.prd_product_count_stock PCS WITH (NOLOCK)
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT 
		'PCD' as Src 
		,di_product_count_id
		,di_product_count_dtl_id 
		,di_product_dtl_id 
		,di_qty_counted  -  di_qty_released as di_qty 
		,PCD.dn_cost  
		,di_warehouse_location_id
	FROM dbo.prd_product_count_dtl PCD WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN dbo.prd_product_dtl_warehouse_location PDWL  WITH (NOLOCK)
				 ON PDWL.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id = PCD.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id
	WHERE di_qty_counted  -  di_qty_released >0
	) PCSD
INNER JOIN dbo.prd_product_count PC  WITH (NOLOCK) ON PC.di_product_count_id = PCSD.di_product_count_id
INNER JOIN dbo.prd_product_dtl PD  WITH (NOLOCK) ON PD.di_product_dtl_id = PCSD.di_product_dtl_id

WHERE [di_status] <4 AND di_qty <> 0 
--AND   [di_product_id] IN (999817)'

QueryReadFromWorkOrder.defaultValue:
'-- Version 1.0
SELECT [ProductId] = [di_product_id]
	,[WarehouseId] = WO.[di_warehouse_id]
	,[WarehouseLocationId]=PDWL.[di_warehouse_location_id]
	,[TransactionHeaderID] = CAST(WO.di_work_order_id AS VARCHAR(30))
	,[TransactionDetailID] = CAST(di_work_order_stock_id AS VARCHAR(40))
	,[RecordNumber]=ROW_NUMBER() OVER 
					(Partition by [di_product_id],WO.[di_warehouse_id]
								,WO.di_work_order_id
								ORDER BY di_work_order_stock_id)
	,[TransactionStatus] = [di_status]
	,[TransactionType] = CAST('Work Order' AS VARCHAR(30))
	,[CreatedDate] = [dd_created]
	,[ReleasedDate] = [dd_released]
	,[CompletedDate] = [dd_completed]
	,[DeleteDate] = [dd_deleted]
	,[JournalDate] = [dd_journal]
	,[RequiredDate] = CAST(NULL AS DATETIME)
	,[FilledDate] = CAST(NULL AS DATETIME)
	,[ConfirmedDeliveryDate] = CAST(NULL AS DATETIME)
	,[Quantity] = WOS.di_qty
	,[UnitCost] = CAST(WOS.dn_cost AS NUMERIC(14, 2))
FROM [dbo].[ord_work_order] WO
  JOIN [dbo].[ord_work_order_stock] WOS ON WOS.di_work_order_id = WO.di_work_order_id
  JOIN [dbo].[prd_product_dtl_warehouse_location] PDWL ON PDWL.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id = WOS.di_product_dtl_warehouse_location_id
  JOIN prd_product_dtl PD ON PD.di_product_dtl_id = PDWL.di_product_dtl_id AND PD.di_warehouse_id = WO.[di_warehouse_id]

--WHERE   [di_product_Id] IN (999817)'
